name: negotiation
description: Prepare and execute negotiations using tactical empathy, calibrated questions, and the Ackerman method. Use when the user mentions "salary negotiation", "contract terms", "handling objections", "mirroring and labeling", "difficult conversation", "deal terms", "BATNA", or "anchoring". Also trigger when preparing for vendor negotiations, resolving pricing disputes, or navigating high-stakes conversations where both parties need to feel heard. Covers accusation audits, Black Swan discovery, and the
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 这是一款辅助谈判准备与执行的工具，帮你应对薪资沟通、合同博弈及价格争议，在化解高风险对话僵局、让对方感到被倾听的同时争取最优结果。
